name: Klondike Solitaire

notes.en: Drag a card (or a run) to a valid pile, or tap a card to select it then tap a destination. Tap the stock to draw. Ctrl+Z/U undo, N new game.
notes.ru: Перетащи карту (или серию карт) на подходящую стопку, либо тапни карту для выбора, затем тапни место назначения. Тапни колоду, чтобы открыть карту. Ctrl+Z/U — отмена, N — новая игра.

notes: Deliberate style exception for this hub (like games/paint-xp and games/penguin-fling): a felt-green classic-card-table look instead of the usual neon-vector theme, fitting for a traditional card game. All 52 cards are plain DOM elements (rounded-rect face, corner rank+suit, center suit-glyph watermark, or a CSS-pattern back) built from the actual Unicode suit glyphs (U+2660/2665/2666/2663) — no bundled image assets. The board is a fixed logical-pixel layout scaled as a whole via CSS transform to always fit the viewport without scrolling (same 'virtual viewport' idea as games/comet's canvas sizing, applied to a DOM subtree), with per-column card-reveal offsets that shrink dynamically so a column can never overflow its budget regardless of card count. Drag uses Pointer Events (not HTML5 DnD) so mouse and touch behave identically; tap-to-select-then-tap-to-place is a full alternative. Undo is whole-state-snapshot based (structuredClone, capped at 200 steps). Foundations are a one-way sink during normal play (no drag-back-to-tableau; Undo reverses a foundation placement) — see README for the full simplification list. Draw-1 and draw-3 stock modes are both supported (toggle in the header).
